Table of Contents

Class ReservaMapper

Namespace
BLL.Mappers
Assembly
BLL.dll

Bidirectional mapper between Reserva domain entities and ReservaDTO projections.

public static class ReservaMapper
Inheritance
object
ReservaMapper
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

ClienteNombre and EspacioNombre are denormalized display fields that cannot be populated from the entity alone. They must be set by the calling service after mapping.

Methods

ToDTO(Reserva)

Projects a Reserva entity to a ReservaDTO.

public static ReservaDTO ToDTO(Reserva entity)

Parameters

entity Reserva

Source entity. Returns null when null.

Returns

ReservaDTO

Remarks

ClienteNombre and EspacioNombre are left empty and must be filled by the service.

ToEntity(ReservaDTO)

Projects a ReservaDTO back to a Reserva entity.

public static Reserva ToEntity(ReservaDTO dto)

Parameters

dto ReservaDTO

Source DTO. Returns null when null.

Returns

Reserva
